name_en: Art Nouveau and Art Deco Museum
name_local: Museo de Art Nouveau y Art Déco

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the doll collection is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la colección de muñecas?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah koh-lek-SYOHN deh moo-NYEH-kahs?

likely_response.local: Sala 3, junto al patio de cristales.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH kree-STAH-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, central room.

responses.english: On the ground floor, central room.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lah HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH kree-STAH-lehs
responses.local: Sala 3, junto al patio de cristales.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition is
phrases.text_local: ¿En qué sala está la exposición temporal actualmente?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿en keh SAH-lah eh-STAH lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN tem-poh-RAHL ah-kwahl-MEN-teh?

likely_response.local: En el primer piso, sala derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh SAH-lah deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, right room.

responses.english: On the first floor, right room.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh SAH-lah deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En el primer piso, sala derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are available now
phrases.text_local: ¿Hay visitas guiadas disponibles en este momento?
phrases.pronunciation: AH-ee vee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs dee-poh-NEE-bles en EH-steh moh-MEN-toh?

likely_response.translation_en: Check the schedule at the entrance.

responses.english: Check the schedule at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Casa Lis building entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde se encuentra la entrada del edificio Casa Lis?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh seh en-kwehn-TRAH lah en-TRAH-dah del eh-dee-FEE-syoh KAH-sah Lees?

likely_response.local: Por el puente de hierro, fachada sur.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR EHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ee-EHR-roh fahth-AH-dah SOOR

responses.phonetic: POHR EHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ee-EHR-roh fahth-AH-dah SOOR
responses.local: Por el puente de hierro, fachada sur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the stained glass facade is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo ver la fachada de vidrieras?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh vehr lah fah-CHAH-dah deh vee-DRYEH-rahs?

likely_response.local: En el patio principal, frente a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Upon exiting, in the inner courtyard.

responses.english: Upon exiting, in the inner courtyard.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: En el patio principal, frente a la entrada.
